remaining_tasks.name: VPC (Visa B2B Payment Controls) — full service implementation in SDK + Portal
remaining_tasks.description: User provided Visa B2B Payment Controls documentation. Need to implement: (1) SDK: VPCService with Account Management (register/get/update/delete), Rules Management (set/delete/get/block/disable-enable), Reporting (notifications + transaction history), IPC Gen-AI (get/set suggested rules), Supplier Validation (register/update/retrieve). Rule codes: HOT, SPV, SPP, MCC, MCG, VPAS, BHR, CHN, LOC etc. (2) Portal cards page: update VCN issuance flow to reflect proper VPC onboarding (register → set rules → notifications). API ref: https://developer.visa.com/capabilities/vpa/reference

decisions.decision: SDK scoped to VCNService + SettlementService + SupplierMatcher + VisaNetworkService only (RFPManager + AuditService removed)
Globe settlement animation uses SVG overlay for arc (not cobe arcs API)
decisions.rationale: cobe v2 does not support dynamic arc updates via update()

decisions.decision: VPC task NOT started this session — context exhausted at 90%
